name: cosignal
description: One concurrency-ready signals library, sync by default: writable atoms, lazy computed values, and effects with alien-signals-compatible semantics on a packed typed-array kernel; registering the React bridge (registerReactBridge) turns on write recording as batches and consistent per-render world views — never used, never paid for beyond one predictable branch. Includes a zero-allocation trace recorder (cosignal/trace).
